message: Hi! I'm looking to make mutually beneficial trades across all 20 rounds. I have costs to cover, so I'll be asking for prices in the upper range. Hoping we can find common ground that works for both of
Upper range is too steep for my budget. I'm targeting prices in the 50s. Let's find a fair middle ground.
I can stretch to 60, but that's my limit. 75 is too high. Meet me at 58?
58 or 60 doesn't work for me - I'd actually lose money at those prices. I need at least 70 to cover costs and make this worthwhile. Can you go higher than 60? There may be more room here
I can work down to 66 if you come up to 64 — that meets us both at 65. I'm cutting it tight, but willing to make a deal. With 18 rounds left, let's not leave money on the
Deal at 65. I'll bid 66, you ask 64.
